title: micranthes lyallii
intro: Micranthes lyallii, also known as Lyall's bitter-sweet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifrage family, Saxifragaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Micranthes lyallii include its potential to act as an anti-inflammatory, reduce fever, and exhibit antibacterial properties, making it a popular choice for traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote digestive health and alleviate various ailments.
